fp.t:
总保单, 总保险单, 全部付讫, 冰点, 凝固点
[计] 浮点, 函数处理器

fpaa.t: abbr. free from particular average absolutely 避免绝对平均

fpc.t: abbr. 联邦动力委员会（Federal Power Commission）；护渔艇（Fishery Protection Cruiser）

fpd.d: n a type of video display that is thin and flat; commonly used in laptop computers

fpga.t: abbr. 现场可编程门阵列（Field Programmable Gata Array）

fpi.t: abbr. family pitch in 家庭努力投入; faded prior to interception 在拦截之前离开; fuel-pressure indicator 燃料压力指示器; fixed price incentive 固定价格刺激

fpl.t: abbr. fireplace 壁炉; final protective line 最后拦阻线; fire plug 消防栓; fused pulmonary lobes 融合的肺叶

fpla.t: [计] 现场可编程序的逻辑阵列

fpm.t: abbr. feet per minute 每分钟…英尺

fpm tests.t: [医] 滤纸显微镜试验(检梅毒的絮凝试验)

fpo.t: 战地邮局, 舰队邮局

fppc.t: abbr. Fair Political Practices Commission 公平政治惯例委员会; flight plan processing center 飞行计划处理中心

fprs.t: abbr. Federal Property Resources Service 联邦财产资源服务; Forest Products Research Society 林产品研究协会

fps.t: 英尺/秒, 英尺磅秒单位制的, (电视图像的)每秒帧数
fps.d: n an agency in the General Services Administration that is a security organization to provide a safe environment where Federal agencies can conduct their business

fpsa.t: [计]= Fixed Partition System Area,固定分区系统区

fpu.t: [计] 文件处理部件, 浮点部件
